gist.headline: Watering the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just finished its daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all the community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status.
gist.impact: Keeps the app showcase and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about automated daily metrics and health checks for the 'greenhouse' (community apps). Visuals: The robot companion (automated bot) checking clipboards in a greenhouse, with Polly the bee watering plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic.
